title: Productboard Spark positions AI as PM strategic infrastructure
claim: Productboard Spark is presented as an AI assistant for product managers that equips initiatives from idea to delivery readiness and can ingest competitors, personas, strategic docs, and feedback notes.
source_snippet: Spark is AI that equips initiatives from idea to delivery readiness.
implication: ProductOS research cannot stop at summaries. It needs competitor-aware research, structured context loading, and decision-path continuity.
followup_questions: Which Spark capabilities are beta-only versus generally available in customer accounts?
